input_artifact: FedRAMP SSP Control AC-2 (Account Management) narrative details.
missing_information_traps: System administrator authorization process details are omitted.
ambiguity_traps: Vague statement about periodic account reviews without specifying timeframe.
sanitized_data_statement: All project data in this narrative is fully simulated and sanitized. No actual FedRAMP program information is used.

input_artifact: POA&M entry for container runtime vulnerability CVE-2023-4567 without scheduled remediation date.
missing_information_traps: Remediation milestones and POC details are missing.
ambiguity_traps: Conflicting text regarding temporary patch availability.
sanitized_data_statement: POA&M fields are synthetic and contain no genuine active program vulnerability reports.

input_artifact: ACAS/Nessus scan output report claiming 12 critical SQL injection warnings on system host.
missing_information_traps: Detailed scanner plugin trigger logs are omitted.
ambiguity_traps: Ambiguous hostname mapping prevents target confirmation.
sanitized_data_statement: ACAS scan parameters are synthetic logs with sanitized hostnames and IP addresses.

input_artifact: DISA STIG checklist gap report for Windows Server 2022 containing 3 failed security assertions.
missing_information_traps: Detailed registry hive snapshot logs are missing.
ambiguity_traps: Contradictory comments regarding local GPO inheritance.
sanitized_data_statement: All GPO settings and registry values are mock variables.

input_artifact: Monthly ConMon log review showing zero account lockout triggers in past 30 days.
missing_information_traps: Audit log daemon health checks are missing.
ambiguity_traps: Undefined 'normal threshold' metrics make comparisons impossible.
sanitized_data_statement: All audit events and lockouts are generated metrics.

input_artifact: SonarQube SAST pipeline scan alerting on hardcoded AWS keys inside a test folder.
missing_information_traps: Pipeline runner execution logs are missing.
ambiguity_traps: Vague file path prevents determining if code is deployed to production.
sanitized_data_statement: Source code traces and repository files are fully synthetic.

missing_information_traps: Corporate parent system authorization state details are missing.
